plan.feature: Sprint 4 Restante: Sidebar + Dirty State + ColaboradorDetalhe Tabs

phases.name: Router Migration (HashRouter to Data Router)
phases.description: Migrate from HashRouter (non-data router) to createHashRouter + RouterProvider so that useBlocker works for dirty state protection in Phase 2. React Router v7 still exports createHashRouter in react-router package. Routes must be converted from JSX <Route> elements to route config objects. All existing navigation (useNavigate, useLocation, Link) continues working unchanged.

subtasks.description: Convert App.tsx routes from JSX <Routes>/<Route> to createHashRouter route config objects. App becomes a layout route component that renders <Outlet> instead of inline <Routes>. The layout route wraps SidebarProvider, AppSidebar, SidebarInset, main, IaChatPanel, TourSetup — everything currently in App(). Route children are defined as route config objects with path + element (lazy not needed). ErrorBoundary wraps each route's errorElement or stays as layout-level.

details.target_structure: App() becomes AppLayout() with <Outlet/>. createHashRouter([{ element: <AppLayout/>, children: [{path:'/', element:<Dashboard/>}, ...] }]) exported. main.tsx uses <RouterProvider router={router}/>
key_hooks_to_preserve: useNavigate() for tour navigation — moves into AppLayout
useLocation() for IaChatPanel conditional + sidebar active state — stays in AppLayout
useIaStore() for Cmd+J toggle — stays in AppLayout
details.critical: The <main> element with overflow-auto MUST remain as the single scroll owner. Layout chain cannot break.

subtasks.description: Update main.tsx to use RouterProvider instead of <HashRouter>. Remove HashRouter import, import createHashRouter from react-router and RouterProvider from react-router/dom (or react-router). Import the router config from App.tsx. ThemeProvider and TooltipProvider stay as outer wrappers around RouterProvider.

details.note: ThemeProvider must wrap RouterProvider since useTheme is used in AppSidebar. Toaster can be outside RouterProvider.

verification.expected: App loads, all routes navigate correctly, no console errors. Test: click Dashboard, Setores, Colaboradores, Escalas, Configuracoes, Empresa — all render. Browser back/forward works.

phases.name: Fase 3: Sidebar Cleanup + ConfiguracoesPagina Avancado
phases.description: Remove 3 sidebar items (Tipos de Contrato, Regras, Memoria), fix tour steps that reference removed items, and add Collapsible 'Configuracoes Avancadas' section to ConfiguracoesPagina containing the IA config card (moved) and a Links Rapidos card.

subtasks.description: Remove 3 items from configNav array in AppSidebar.tsx. Keep only Feriados. The configNav array at line 62 currently has 4 items — filter to just [{label:'Feriados', to:'/feriados', icon:CalendarDays}]. Remove unused icon imports (FileText, ShieldCheck, Brain) if no longer referenced elsewhere in the file.

details.tour_ids_affected: NAV_CONTRATOS and NAV_REGRAS tour IDs are no longer assigned to any sidebar item

subtasks.description: Fix tour steps in TourSetup.tsx. Remove step 7 (NAV_CONTRATOS — Tipos de Contrato) and step 11 (NAV_REGRAS — Regras do Motor) from the tourSteps array since those sidebar items no longer exist. Renumber remaining steps mentally but array indices handle themselves. Also remove NAV_CONTRATOS and NAV_REGRAS from TOUR_STEP_IDS in tour-constants.ts since they are no longer used anywhere.

steps_to_remove: Step 7 (index 6): NAV_CONTRATOS — 'Tipos de Contrato' with onEnter navigateTo('/tipos-contrato')

verification.expected: No TypeScript errors. No references to NAV_CONTRATOS or NAV_REGRAS remain.

subtasks.description: Add Collapsible 'Configuracoes Avancadas' section to ConfiguracoesPagina.tsx AFTER the Backup card. The Collapsible starts closed by default. Inside it: (1) Move the existing IA config card (currently lines ~521-694) into the Collapsible content, (2) Add a new 'Links Rapidos' card with 3 navigation links using react-router Link: Tipos de Contrato (/tipos-contrato, FileText icon), Regras do Motor (/regras, ShieldCheck icon), Base de Conhecimento (/memoria, Brain icon). Each link should have icon + label + ChevronRight or ExternalLink indicator. Import Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent from shadcn. Import ChevronsUpDown for trigger icon.

card_order_after: Collapsible Avancado (IA card + Links Rapidos card)

collapsible_structure.trigger: Button variant='ghost' with 'Configuracoes Avancadas' label + ChevronsUpDown icon
content: Existing IA config card (cut-paste, preserve all closures/state)
New Links Rapidos card with 3 Link items

new_imports: FileText, ShieldCheck, Brain, ChevronRight from lucide-react (some may already be imported)

verification.instructions: Navigate to /configuracoes. Verify: (1) Collapsible 'Avancado' appears after Backup card, (2) It starts CLOSED, (3) Clicking opens it showing IA card + Links card, (4) Links navigate correctly to /tipos-contrato, /regras, /memoria, (5) IA config form still saves correctly, (6) Dark mode renders properly.

phases.name: Fase 4: Dirty State Protection
phases.description: Create useDirtyGuard hook (uses useBlocker from react-router) and DirtyGuardDialog component (uses shadcn AlertDialog). Apply to 4 pages: ColaboradorDetalhe, SetorDetalhe, EmpresaConfig, ConfiguracoesPagina. Requires Phase 0 (router migration) to be complete for useBlocker to work.

subtasks.description: Create useDirtyGuard hook at src/renderer/src/hooks/useDirtyGuard.ts (~50 lines). Takes { isDirty: boolean, message?: string }. Uses useBlocker(isDirty) from 'react-router' to block navigation when form is dirty. Also adds window beforeunload listener as fallback for window/tab close. Returns the blocker object for use with DirtyGuardDialog. The useBlocker from react-router v7 returns { state: 'unblocked' | 'blocked' | 'proceeding', reset(), proceed() }.

details.hook_signature: export function useDirtyGuard({ isDirty, message }: { isDirty: boolean; message?: string }): Blocker
details.beforeunload_logic: useEffect that adds/removes beforeunload listener based on isDirty. Event.preventDefault() + returnValue = message for browser native dialog.

subtasks.description: Create DirtyGuardDialog component at src/renderer/src/componentes/DirtyGuardDialog.tsx (~30 lines). Takes blocker: Blocker prop. If blocker.state !== 'blocked', returns null. Otherwise renders shadcn AlertDialog (open={true}) with: Title='Alteracoes nao salvas', Description='Voce tem alteracoes que nao foram salvas. Deseja sair mesmo assim?', Cancel button='Continuar editando' (calls blocker.reset()), Confirm button='Sair sem salvar' (calls blocker.proceed(), variant destructive).

details.component_signature: export function DirtyGuardDialog({ blocker }: { blocker: Blocker })
details.imports: Blocker from 'react-router'; AlertDialog, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle from @/components/ui/alert-dialog
details.critical: AlertDialog open={blocker.state === 'blocked'} — controlled mode, no trigger needed

subtasks.description: Apply useDirtyGuard + DirtyGuardDialog to EmpresaConfig.tsx (easiest page — single form). Import both. Call: const blocker = useDirtyGuard({ isDirty: form.formState.isDirty }). Add <DirtyGuardDialog blocker={blocker} /> at end of JSX return (before closing div).

details.placement: Import useDirtyGuard, DirtyGuardDialog. Call hook after form declaration. Render dialog at bottom of JSX.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /empresa. Edit company name. Click sidebar link. Dialog should appear. Click 'Continuar editando' — stays on page. Edit again, click sidebar — click 'Sair sem salvar' — navigates away. Save form, then navigate — no dialog.

subtasks.description: Apply useDirtyGuard + DirtyGuardDialog to ConfiguracoesPagina.tsx. The IA form (iaForm) is the one that needs protection. Call: const blocker = useDirtyGuard({ isDirty: iaForm.formState.isDirty }). Add <DirtyGuardDialog blocker={blocker} /> at end of JSX.

details.note: This page was already modified in phase-1 (Collapsible). Apply dirty guard to the same file.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /configuracoes. Open Avancado collapsible. Edit IA API key. Navigate away — dialog appears.

subtasks.description: Apply useDirtyGuard + DirtyGuardDialog to SetorDetalhe.tsx. The setorForm covers the main setor data card. Call: const blocker = useDirtyGuard({ isDirty: setorForm.formState.isDirty }). Add <DirtyGuardDialog blocker={blocker} /> at end of JSX.

details.note: SetorDetalhe has multiple sections but only the main setor form is covered by react-hook-form. Other sections (demandas, escalas) save individually.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /setores/:id. Edit setor name. Navigate away — dialog appears. Save and navigate — no dialog.

subtasks.description: Apply useDirtyGuard + DirtyGuardDialog to ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx. The colabForm covers Cards A-C (info pessoal, contrato, preferencias). Call: const blocker = useDirtyGuard({ isDirty: colabForm.formState.isDirty }). Add <DirtyGuardDialog blocker={blocker} /> at end of JSX. Cards E-G use raw useState and are NOT covered — this is explicitly accepted per PRD constraints.

details.partial_coverage: Only Cards A-C (nome, sexo, setor, contrato, funcao, horas, preferencias). Cards E-G (regras horario, excecoes data) save individually via useState — risk accepted.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /colaboradores/:id. Edit nome. Navigate away — dialog appears. Save and navigate — no dialog.

phases.name: Fase 5: ColaboradorDetalhe Tabs + Sexo Fix
phases.description: Reorganize ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx (1311 lines) into 3 shadcn Tabs: Geral (Cards A+B+C unified), Horarios (Cards E+F+G), Ausencias (Card D with badge). Also fix sexo default from 'M' to empty string in both frontend and IA tools.

subtasks.description: Wrap ColaboradorDetalhe content area (below PageHeader) in shadcn Tabs component with 3 tabs: 'Geral', 'Horarios', 'Ausencias'. Use defaultValue='geral'. TabsList goes at the top of the content area. Each TabsContent wraps the relevant cards. Tab 'Ausencias' gets a Badge with count of active excecoes (excecoes.length or filtered by date). Import Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent from @/components/ui/tabs and Badge from @/components/ui/badge.

tab_mapping.geral: Cards A (Info Pessoal, L595-663) + B (Contrato, L665-778) + C (Preferencias, L780-845) — will be unified in subtask-3-2
tab_mapping.horarios: Cards E (Regras Horario, L848-1044) + F (Excecoes Data, L1046-1108)
tab_mapping.ausencias: Card D (Excecoes, L1110-1178) + Dialog nova excecao (L1247-1308)

critical: All useState hooks MUST remain at component top level (React rules of hooks) — they cannot be moved inside TabsContent
colabForm is used by Cards A-C AND by the Save button in PageHeader — form must span all tabs
Dialogs (exc_data L1182-1244, nova_excecao L1247-1308) must remain outside Tabs since they are portaled anyway
Layout: Tabs inside the content area div, NO overflow-y-auto added
details.badge_for_ausencias: Badge variant='secondary' showing count of active excecoes — e.g., excecoes.filter(e => !e.data_fim || new Date(e.data_fim) >= new Date()).length

verification.instructions: Navigate to /colaboradores/:id. Verify 3 tabs render. Click each tab — content switches without crash. Save button in PageHeader still saves colabForm data. Ausencias tab shows badge with excecao count.

subtasks.description: Unify Cards A + B + C into a single Card 'Dados do Colaborador' inside TabsContent value='geral'. Currently they are 3 separate Card components. Merge into 1 Card with: (1) Grid 2-col for main fields (nome, sexo, setor, funcao, tipo_contrato, horas_semanais, tipo_trabalhador), (2) Separator, (3) Section 'Preferencias' with prefere_turno and evitar_dia_semana. All fields remain part of colabForm (react-hook-form). Remove the 3 individual CardHeader/CardTitle wrappers.

details.layout: Single Card → CardHeader 'Dados do Colaborador' → CardContent → grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 for fields → Separator → 'Preferencias' sub-section
details.note: This is a JSX restructure only — no logic changes. All FormField controllers stay the same.

verification.instructions: Tab Geral shows single unified card. All 9+ fields render correctly. Form validation still works. Save button saves all fields.

subtasks.description: Fix sexo default in ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx. Change defaultValues.sexo from 'M' to '' (empty string). The Zod schema already has z.enum(['M','F']) which will reject empty string on submit — this forces the user to explicitly choose. Add a placeholder to the sexo Select trigger like 'Selecione' so it does not show blank.

details.line_183: sexo: 'M' → sexo: '' (as any to satisfy z.enum typing, or use z.enum(['M','F','']).refine with transform)
details.select_placeholder: Add <SelectValue placeholder='Selecione' /> to the sexo Select
details.zod_approach: Keep z.enum(['M','F']) in colabSchema. For defaultValues, use sexo: '' as '' — the form will show placeholder, and Zod will catch empty on submit with proper error message.

verification.instructions: Create new colaborador — sexo shows 'Selecione' placeholder, not 'M'. Submit without choosing sexo — validation error appears. Choose M or F — submit works.

subtasks.description: Fix sexo default in IA tools.ts. Remove the line 'if (!dados.sexo) dados.sexo = 'M'' from applyColaboradorDefaults function (~line 1078). Instead, in the 'criar' tool handler (around line 1650), BEFORE calling applyColaboradorDefaults, check if dados.sexo is missing/empty. If so, return toolError with correction message asking the IA to ask the user for the collaborator's sex. Same check needed in 'cadastrar_lote' tool handler (~line 2463) — if any item in the batch is missing sexo, return toolError listing which items need sexo.

details.criar_handler_check: Before applyColaboradorDefaults: if (!dados.sexo) return toolError('Campo sexo e obrigatorio', { correction: 'Pergunte ao usuario se o colaborador e masculino (M) ou feminino (F) antes de cadastrar.' })
details.cadastrar_lote_check: Before loop/applyDefaults: filter items without sexo, if any return toolError listing names that need sexo
details.toolError_pattern: Uses existing toolError() helper with correction field

phase_breakdown.phase-0: 2 subtasks — Router migration prerequisite (~50 lines across 2 files)
phase_breakdown.phase-1: 3 subtasks — Sidebar cleanup + tour fix + ConfiguracoesPagina collapsible
phase_breakdown.phase-2: 6 subtasks — Hook + Component + apply to 4 pages
phase_breakdown.phase-3: 4 subtasks — Tabs wrapper + card unification + sexo fix frontend + sexo fix backend

critical_risks: Router migration (phase-0) is the riskiest change — if createHashRouter breaks any navigation, all downstream phases are affected. Must verify ALL routes work after migration.
ColaboradorDetalhe is 1311 lines. Tab restructure (phase-3) must preserve all hooks at top level and keep colabForm spanning across tabs.
ConfiguracoesPagina IA card move (~170 lines of JSX with complex state) into Collapsible must preserve all closures.
summary.parallelization: Phase 0 and Phase 1 can run in parallel (no file overlap). Phase 2 depends on Phase 0. Phase 3 depends on Phase 2 (dirty guard already applied to ColaboradorDetalhe before tabs restructure).
